item.title: Deep Architecture
item.description: #slide-window { position: relative; width: 100%; height: calc(100vh - 50px); overflow: hidden; top: 50px; left: 0px; } #slides-list { width: 100%; height: calc(100vh - 50px); position: absolute; object-fit: contain; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; -webkit-transform: translate3d(0px, 0px, 0px); transform: translate3d(0px, 0px, 0px); transition: all 0.66s ease; -webkit-transition: all 0.66s ease; } .slide { list-style: none; position: relative; float: left; margin: 0; padding: 0; width: 100%; height: calc(100vh - 50px); background: #fff; text-align: center; line-height: 100%; background-size: cover; background-position: 50% 50%; color: #fff; -webkit-transform: translate3d(0px, 0px, 0px); -webkit-transform-style: preserve-3d; } .

item.title: Urban space design
item.description: #slide-window { position: relative; width: 100%; height: calc(100vh - 50px); overflow: hidden; top: 50px; left: 0px; } #slides-list { width: 100%; height: calc(100vh - 50px); position: absolute; object-fit: contain; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; -webkit-transform: translate3d(0px, 0px, 0px); transform: translate3d(0px, 0px, 0px); transition: all 0.66s ease; -webkit-transition: all 0.66s ease; } .slide { list-style: none; position: relative; float: left; margin: 0; padding: 0; width: 100%; height: calc(100vh - 50px); background: #fff; text-align: center; line-height: 100%; background-size: cover; background-position: 50% 50%; color: #fff; -webkit-transform: translate3d(0px, 0px, 0px); -webkit-transform-style: preserve-3d; } .

item.title: Ordinary dreams
